```{r composition-pct-at2}
         x = "Sample (age_days)", y = paste0(celltype_use, " cells (%)")) +
    guides(fill = "none")
}

make_pct_plot("AT2_2")
make_pct_plot("Bud Tip")
```

```{r composition-pct-all, fig.height=16, fig.width=8}
# All cell types as % total, faceted
plot_df_all <- meta_df %>%
  filter(group %in% c("fetal","pediatric")) %>%
  group_by(batch, group, age_days, cell_type3) %>%
  summarise(celltype_cells = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(total_df, by = "batch") %>%
  mutate(pct = 100 * celltype_cells / total_cells) %>%
  filter(!is.na(age_days), !is.na(pct)) %>%
  arrange(cell_type3, group, age_days) %>%
  mutate(sample_age = paste0(batch, " (", age_days, ")")) %>%
  group_by(cell_type3, group) %>%
  mutate(sample_age = factor(sample_age, levels = unique(sample_age))) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(plot_df_all, aes(x = sample_age, y = pct, fill = group)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", width = 0.85) +
  facet_wrap(~ cell_type3, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("fetal" = "#6A3D9A", "pediatric" = "#F28E2B")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Cell types as % of total cells per sample",
       x = "Sample (age_days)", y = "Cells (%)") +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

## Lineage-Filtered Cell Counts Per Sample

```{r composition-lineage-weights}
# Extract per-lineage cell assignments from Slingshot curve weights
w_sling  <- SummarizedExperiment::assay(sds_BT, "weights")
lin1_cells <- rownames(w_sling)[w_sling[, "Lineage1"] > 0]
lin2_cells <- rownames(w_sling)[w_sling[, "Lineage2"] > 0]
lin3_cells <- rownames(w_sling)[w_sling[, "Lineage3"] > 0]
lin4_cells <- rownames(w_sling)[w_sling[, "Lineage4"] > 0]
```

```{r composition-lineage-plots, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
make_lineage_plot <- function(cells_lin, celltypes_to_plot, title_str) {
  plot_df <- meta_df %>%
    mutate(cell = rownames(meta_df)) %>%
    filter(cell %in% cells_lin,
           cell_type3 %in% celltypes_to_plot,
           group %in% c("fetal","pediatric")) %>%
    group_by(cell_type3, group, batch, age_days) %>%
    summarise(n_cells = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(cell_type3, group, age_days) %>%
    group_by(cell_type3, group) %>%
    mutate(sample_age = factor(paste0(batch," (",age_days,")"), levels = unique(paste0(batch," (",age_days,")")))) %>%
    ungroup()
  plot_df$cell_type3 <- factor(plot_df$cell_type3, levels = celltypes_to_plot)
  plot_df$group      <- factor(plot_df$group, levels = c("fetal","pediatric"))

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = sample_age, y = n_cells, fill = group)) +
    geom_col(color = "black", width = 0.85) +
    facet_grid(cell_type3 ~ group, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("fetal" = "#6A3D9A", "pediatric" = "#F28E2B")) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)) +
    labs(title = title_str, x = "Sample (age_days)", y = "Number of cells") +
    guides(fill = "none")
}

make_lineage_plot(lin1_cells,
  c("Bud Tip","AT2_2","Transitional","AT1_5","AT1_4","AT1_1","AT1_2"),
  "Cell counts per sample (Lineage1 by weights)")

make_lineage_plot(lin2_cells,
  c("Bud Tip","AT2_2","Transitional","AT1_5","AT1_4","AT1_3"),
  "Cell counts per sample (Lineage2 by weights)")

make_lineage_plot(lin3_cells,
  c("Bud Tip","AT2_2","AT2_1","AT2_3"),
  "Cell counts per sample (Lineage3 by weights)")

make_lineage_plot(lin4_cells,
  c("Bud Tip","AT2_2","AT2_1","AT2_4"),
  "Cell counts per sample (Lineage4 by weights)")
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Final Outputs

```{r final-save-all}
# Save all major analysis objects
saveRDS(TF_fetal_nuc,                       file = "/Users/amandawu/University of Michigan Dropbox/Amanda Wu/Spence Lab/Sequencing data/processed/TF_fetal_nuc_cluster.rds")
saveRDS(TF_pediatric_nuc_subset,            file = "/Users/amandawu/University of Michigan Dropbox/Amanda Wu/Spence Lab/Sequencing data/processed/TF_pediatric_nuc_subset_cluster.rds")
saveRDS(TF_fetal_pediatric,                 file = "/Users/amandawu/University of Michigan Dropbox/Amanda Wu/Spence Lab/Sequencing data/processed/TF_fetal_pediatric_cluster.rds")
saveRDS(TF_fetal_pediatric_epi_pre,         file = "/Users/amandawu/University of Michigan Dropbox/Amanda Wu/Spence Lab/Sequencing data/processed/TF_fetal_pediatric_epi_pre.rds")
saveRDS(TF_fetal_pediatric_epi_post,        file = "/Users/amandawu/University of Michigan Dropbox/Amanda Wu/Spence Lab/Sequencing data/processed/TF_fetal_pediatric_epi_post.rds")
saveRDS(TF_Alve_subset,                     file = "/Users/amandawu/University of Michigan Dropbox/Amanda Wu/Spence Lab/Sequencing data/processed/TF_Alve_subset_cluster_v2.rds")
saveRDS(cellchat,                           file = "/Users/amandawu/University of Michigan Dropbox/Amanda Wu/Spence Lab/Sequencing data/processed/cellchat_TF_Alve_subset.rds")
saveRDS(sce_post,                           file = "/Users/amandawu/University of Michigan Dropbox/Amanda Wu/Spence Lab/Sequencing data/processed/TF_fetal_pediatric_epi_post_alve_sce.rds")
```

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
